name: Birkin 30 leather handbag
description:
Hermes Birkin 30

Colour: Gold

Leather: Clemence

Hardware: PHW (Palladium)

Included: Clochette, lock and keys and dust bag

Stamp: N Square (2010)

The general condition of the bag is very good. Wear on the corners is visible. Minor scratches on the hardware. No bad smell.

Eligible for the Hermes Spa

✅ AUTHENTICITY GUARANTEED

✨ We are not affiliated with any of the brands published. All rights reserved to their legitimate owners. Covered by the First Sale Doctrine.

🛍️ Detailed notes for buyers

🚚 SHIPPING

Orders are shipped within 24 to 48 hours. Tracking will be provided for all shipments.

📌 ITEM CONDITION

All items are sold as is and their price is set according to their current condition. Each piece is inspected with care, but minor wear or imperfections may not be explicitly mentioned.

♻️ PRE-OWNED NATURE

Most items are pre-owned and may show normal signs of wear, such as:
• Slight scratches
• Discoloration
• Small imperfections

Please manage your expectations accordingly.

📸 PHOTOS = DESCRIPTION

The photos shown are considered part of the item description. 🔍 Examine all images carefully. Although I strive to show every detail accurately, some subtle flaws or smells may not be fully captured or may vary depending on perception.

🎨 COLOUR VARIATIONS

The actual colours may vary slightly due to lighting or monitor settings. What you see on screen may not be 100% accurate in reality.

📩 QUESTIONS OR ADDITIONAL PHOTOS?

Do not hesitate to contact us! If you need additional information or photos, send me a message before buying.

📦 STORAGE AND HANDLING

The items have been stored with care, but are not new. If you expect items in perfect condition or like new from the store, please consider this before buying.


💖 THANK YOU!

Your support is very important. 🌟 Happy shopping and enjoy your luxury find! 👜✨
